segments.text: My son, keep my words, And treasure my commands within you.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Keep my commands and live, And my law as the apple of your eye.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Bind them on your fingers; Write them on the tablet of your heart.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Say to wisdom, 'You are my sister,' And call understanding your nearest kin,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: That they may keep you from the immoral woman, From the seductress who flatters with her words.
For at the window of my house I looked through my lattice,
And saw among the simple, I perceived among the youths, A young man devoid of understanding,
Passing along the street near her corner; And he took the path to her house
In the twilight, in the evening, In the black and dark night.
And there a woman met him, With the attire of a harlot, and a crafty heart.
She was loud and rebellious, Her feet would not stay at home.
At times she was outside, at times in the open square, Lurking at every corner.
So she caught him and kissed him; With an impudent face she said to him:
I have peace offerings with me; Today I have paid my vows.
segments.speaker: Immoral Woman

segments.text: So I came out to meet you, Diligently to seek your face, And I have found you.
segments.speaker: Immoral Woman

segments.text: I have spread my bed with tapestry, Colored coverings of Egyptian linen.
segments.speaker: Immoral Woman

segments.text: I have perfumed my bed With myrrh, aloes, and cinnamon.
segments.speaker: Immoral Woman

segments.text: Come, let us take our fill of love until morning; Let us delight ourselves with love.
segments.speaker: Immoral Woman

segments.text: For my husband is not at home; He has gone on a long journey;
segments.speaker: Immoral Woman

segments.text: He has taken a bag of money with him, And will come home on the appointed day.
segments.speaker: Immoral Woman

segments.text: With her enticing speech she caused him to yield, With her flattering lips she seduced him.
Immediately he went after her, as an ox goes to the slaughter, Or as a fool to the correction of the stocks,
Till an arrow struck his liver. As a bird hastens to the snare, He did not know it would cost his life.
Now therefore, listen to me, my children; Pay attention to the words of my mouth:
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Do not let your heart turn aside to her ways, Do not stray into her paths;
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: For she has cast down many wounded, And all who were slain by her were strong men.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Her house is the way to hell, Descending to the chambers of death.
segments.speaker: Solomon
